To whom it may concern,

Anyone who shares (no matter in hardcopy or softcopy) or resells course notes, audio and video recordings in any media channel (websites, whatsapp, telegram, wechat, carousell, etc) without the IP holder's prior consent will violate the Copyright Ordinance Cap.528 of Hong Kong. Once evidence has been gathered, cases will be reported to Customs and Excise Department as well as HKICPA for such potential violation.

As a future professional accountant, he needs to comply with the Code of Ethics for Professional Accountants ("CoE") and if he has violated the Copyright Ordinance and once charged, he has also violated the general principles of professional behavior and integrity under CoE.

Please do not risk yourself to violate/break the law.
